name: Scan Mode — Audit all installed skills
description: Tests Claude Code Skillforge's ability to discover and audit all installed skills across both ecosystems.
expected_behaviors: Runs key checks on each skill: front matter size, standard fields, name constraints, description format, line count, imperative verbs
Outputs a health report table with columns: Skill, Ecosystem, Checks Passed, Issues, Top Issue
Sorts results by most issues first
Suggests running Upgrade on the most critical skill
